web_scraping.name: Scrapling
web_scraping.purpose: Adaptive web scraping, fetchers, spiders, CLI, and optional MCP/AI support.

context_compression.name: Graphify
context_compression.purpose: Builds a queryable project knowledge graph so agents can ask targeted architecture questions instead of reading large source dumps.

context_compression.name: Claude-Mem
context_compression.purpose: Persistent session memory with progressive retrieval: compact search, timeline context, then selected full observations.

market_intelligence.name: Market Intelligence Platform App
market_intelligence.purpose: Reference architecture adapted locally as a Python crypto market intelligence layer for Polymarket/Gamma markets.

market_intelligence.name: OpenBB
market_intelligence.purpose: Financial data platform reference for market data aggregation, research workflows, and agent tooling. Use as an external context reference or bounded adapter target only.
required_guardrails: Do not bypass parser, risk, ledger, or execution-mode checks

agent_methodologies.name: Everything Claude Code
agent_methodologies.purpose: Codex/Claude/OpenCode-compatible skill and instruction patterns; adopt selectively to avoid loading a large generic skill pack.

agent_methodologies.name: Superpowers
agent_methodologies.purpose: Spec-first, TDD-oriented agentic development methodology for reducing rework and keeping task context focused.

agent_methodologies.name: GSD / get-shit-done
agent_methodologies.purpose: Context-engineered, spec-driven development workflow adapted locally through phase gates, compact task packets, and verification reports.

agent_methodologies.name: GitAgent
agent_methodologies.purpose: Git workflow automation reference for PR review, commit analysis, and branch operations.

agent_methodologies.name: MiroThinker
agent_methodologies.purpose: Reasoning reference for multi-step planning, decision analysis, and confidence scoring.

agent_methodologies.name: Ruflo
agent_methodologies.purpose: Multi-agent orchestration and RAG workflow reference for bounded research/review tasks.

agent_frameworks.name: Hermes Agent
agent_frameworks.purpose: Self-improving agent loop, tools, skills, memory, messaging gateways, MCP integration.

agent_frameworks.name: PraisonAI
agent_frameworks.purpose: Multi-agent workflows with memory, RAG, tools, and broad LLM provider support.

agent_frameworks.name: Meta-Agent-with-More-Agents
agent_frameworks.purpose: Meta-agent task delegation pattern using specialist agents for tool use and reasoning.

autonomous_problem_solving.name: AI-Problem-Solver
autonomous_problem_solving.purpose: Recursive AI agent loop that analyzes, designs, and executes code fixes for bugs and new features.

autonomous_problem_solving.name: OpenClaw GitHub Issue Resolver
autonomous_problem_solving.purpose: Automated skill for ingesting issue specifications, selecting file context, and submitting PR-ready code modifications.

autonomous_problem_solving.name: Haystack GitHub Issue Resolver Agent
autonomous_problem_solving.purpose: Cookbook reference for multi-agent tool calling pipelines to resolve engineering issues with high verification standards.
